releaseNotes: v0.40 — Receive a shipment and reconcile it against your stock. New: a Receiving flow (under Reports) imports a supplier's manifest (CSV/XLSX) or an EPCIS file (XML/JSON), matches each expected line against the bottles you scanned, and flags short, over, not-received, and unexpected items for you to review — accept, quarantine as suspect (per bottle, never mixed back into stock), or mark not received, each with a note. Finalizing freezes a receiving record you can export to CSV; it's also included in your DSCSA audit pack and backups. The EPCIS reader is correct, not a checkbox: it joins commissioning lots to shipped serials, expands case/pallet (SSCC) aggregation, and blocks loudly when a file can't be fully expanded rather than guessing. Honest scope: receiving verification + recordkeeping, NOT a compliance/EPCIS-certification engine. Under the hood: new local tables (schema v25) and a durable per-row receiving record. The auto-updater rolls 0.39.0 -> 0.40.0 on next launch; your data is unchanged. 981 tests passing; three-reviewer pre-release audit (Opus + Sonnet + Codex), all findings fixed.
